'''kodabaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:tubar|tubar]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-d-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tubar|tubar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kodabaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kodabithi|kodabithi]] || [[word:kodabiji|kodabiji]] || [[word:kodabishi|kodabishi]] || [[word:kodabiki|kodabiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kodabuthuthu|kodabuthuthu]] || [[word:kodabujuju|kodabujuju]] || [[word:kodabushushu|kodabushushu]] || [[word:kodabukuku|kodabukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kodabuthu|kodabuthu]] || [[word:kodabuju|kodabuju]] || [[word:kodabushu|kodabushu]] || [[word:kodabuku|kodabuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kodabufthuf|kodabufthuf]] || [[word:kodabufjuf|kodabufjuf]] || [[word:kodabufshuf|kodabufshuf]] || [[word:kodabufkuf|kodabufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kodabethe|kodabethe]] || [[word:kodabeje|kodabeje]] || [[word:kodabeshe|kodabeshe]] || [[word:kodabeke|kodabeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kodabothotho|kodabothotho]] || [[word:kodabojojo|kodabojojo]] || [[word:kodaboshosho|kodaboshosho]] || [[word:kodabokoko|kodabokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kodabotho|kodabotho]] || [[word:kodabojo|kodabojo]] || [[word:kodabosho|kodabosho]] || [[word:kodaboko|kodaboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kodabofthof|kodabofthof]] || [[word:kodabofjof|kodabofjof]] || [[word:kodabofshof|kodabofshof]] || [[word:kodabofkof|kodabofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kodabÃŸfthÃŸf|kodabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kodabÃŸfjÃŸf|kodabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kodabÃŸfshÃŸf|kodabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kodabÃŸfkÃŸf|kodabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kodabÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|kodabÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kodabÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|kodabÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kodabÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|kodabÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kodabÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|kodabÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kodabÃŸfthÃŸf|kodabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kodabÃŸfjÃŸf|kodabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kodabÃŸfshÃŸf|kodabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kodabÃŸfkÃŸf|kodabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kodabÃŸfthÃŸf|kodabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kodabÃŸfjÃŸf|kodabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kodabÃŸfshÃŸf|kodabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kodabÃŸfkÃŸf|kodabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kodabÃḊthÃḊ|kodabÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:kodabÃḊjÃḊ|kodabÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:kodabÃḊshÃḊ|kodabÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:kodabÃḊkÃḊ|kodabÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kodabathatha|kodabathatha]] || [[word:kodabajaja|kodabajaja]] || [[word:kodabashasha|kodabashasha]] || [[word:kodabakaka|kodabakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kodabatha|kodabatha]] || [[word:kodabaja|kodabaja]] || [[word:kodabasha|kodabasha]] || [[word:kodabaka|kodabaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kodabafthaf|kodabafthaf]] || [[word:kodabafjaf|kodabafjaf]] || [[word:kodabafshaf|kodabafshaf]] || [[word:kodabafkaf|kodabafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:kodabasha|kodabasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:kodabshÃḋsha|kodabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kodabrosha|kodabrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kodabmusha|kodabmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:kodabyasha|kodabyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokodabnkshÃḋsha|gokodabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokodabnkrosha|gokodabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokodabnkmusha|gokodabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokodabnkyasha|gokodabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:kodadabasha|kodadabasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kodadabshÃḋsha|kodadabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kodadabrosha|kodadabrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kodadabmusha|kodadabmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kodadabyasha|kodadabyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokodadabnkshÃḋsha|gokodadabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokodadabnkrosha|gokodadabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokodadabnkmusha|gokodadabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokodadabnkyasha|gokodadabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kedÃḊbasha|kedÃḊbasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kedÃḊbshÃḋsha|kedÃḊbshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kedÃḊbrosha|kedÃḊbrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kedÃḊbmusha|kedÃḊbmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kedÃḊbyasha|kedÃḊbyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokedÃḊbnkshÃḋsha|gokedÃḊbnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokedÃḊbnkrosha|gokedÃḊbnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokedÃḊbnkmusha|gokedÃḊbnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokedÃḊbnkyasha|gokedÃḊbnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:kodfabasha|kodfabasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kodfabshÃḋsha|kodfabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kodfabrosha|kodfabrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kodfabmusha|kodfabmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kodfabyasha|kodfabyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokodfabnkshÃḋsha|gokodfabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokodfabnkrosha|gokodfabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokodfabnkmusha|gokodfabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokodfabnkyasha|gokodfabnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
